purpose: Initial no-client real-PDF automation readiness test.
operator_notes: Use public, sample, internal-owned, or customer-authorized PDFs only.
Do not add login-only/paywalled/private plan-room documents without authorization.
The harness produces internal readiness reports only; it does not deliver estimates.

documents.source_notes: Public agency bid package; replace this example before running.
documents.testing_notes: Record whether plans are text-readable, scanned/image-heavy, or missing addenda.
